g.text: Storage: vector DB + knowledge graph + SQL
How to accomplish specific task types
System prompt · tools · top-3 LTM · working mem · task state
Rate limited · network error · tool not found
Fix: retry + backoff · circuit breaker · fallback
Rate limited · malformed tool call JSON
Fix: step governor · loop detection · checkpoint
Code timeout · quota exceeded · security block
Fix: reject early · hard limits · inform user
Circuit breaker states: closed — half-open — open
